response.overview: # Translation  It tells the story of three close friends who drifted in choosing their life paths until they became entangled in the world of organized crime. Fazarul, Khalid and Sean have been close friends since childhood. Friendship, love stories and family affection are woven together with teenage mischief that begins to bring trouble when boundaries are crossed. They have been close friends since childhood. Wherever Fazarul is, Khalid and Sean are sure to be by his side. Teenage mischief is considered normal. However, it begins to bring trouble when its limits are overstepped. Their youthful spirits begin to drift uncontrollably. Khalid makes a wrong choice in his life path. Gradually he is drawn into the world of organized crime groups. Day by day it becomes harder to escape. A desire to have fun at an entertainment center only invites conflict. That seedy place becomes a tragedy. Sean becomes the first victim. Fazarul still has strong spirit.
response.title: Epilog 3 Naga
